title: mentha longifolia subsp. kotschyana
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. kotschyana, also known as Hungarian mint or woolly mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant species Mentha longifolia. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. kotschyana include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
